Changelog
v2.1.38 (2019-11-17)

Notifications:
 * New: Added custom JSON headers to the webhook notification agent.
UI:
 * Fix: Homepage recently watched card not showing grouped history.
Other:
 * New: Added GitHub sponsor donation option.
 * Change: Improve resolving hostnames.
